root_causes: connection refused while dialing upstream inventory-svc
prevention_steps: Implement proper resource management to avoid OOMKills
Check and optimize database connections to prevent timeouts
Review and update RBAC permissions to prevent access denied errors
Monitor and optimize service connections to prevent connection refused errors
immediate_actions: Restart the container and check for memory leaks
Check the user-service connection and optimize the database query
Grant necessary permissions to access the admin page
Check the inventory-svc connection and restart the service if necessary
